title: Gym Network - REKT
relevance_summary: Lack of caller verification leading to fake deposit creation and subsequent withdrawal

prevention.rule: Block any tx that creates fake deposits without making a payment

red_flags: Introduction of new code after audits
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that creates fake deposits without making a payment
summary: Gym Network's Single Pool Contract had a vulnerability due to lack of caller verification, allowing attackers to create fake deposits and withdraw them. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions.
